description: Anthropic Messages streaming with the 2025-08-25 code execution server tool. Focuses on tool input streaming edge cases and result payload normalization.

source.notes: Replayed via FakeAnthropicClient; encoded as canonical AI SDK v3 JSONL via encodeV3StreamParts.

notes: Provider-executed tool input is streamed as raw JSON string fragments; do not JSON-decode deltas.
